summary: Iteration 27 backend-only verification of News Manager + RSS Feeds consolidation, Page presets + seed-reserved, and sidebar-configs public endpoint. 21/21 pytest tests passed.
tests_performed: POST /api/news/feeds with unreachable URL -> saved with status='unreachable' + fetch_error populated + ok=false
POST /api/news/feeds with blank name + reachable URL (feedburner TheHackersNews) -> name auto-populated from feed title
POST /api/news/feeds/{id}/refresh after PATCHing an unreachable feed to reachable URL -> status flips 'unreachable' -> 'ok', article_count/feed/error returned
GET /api/news/feeds -> all feeds include status/fetch_error/last_fetched fields
DELETE /api/news/feeds/{id} -> 200 first time, 404 second time; anonymous 401/403
GET /api/news/mixed-feed -> returns {items:[...]} with source in {article, rss}, sorted desc by published_at
GET /api/pages/presets -> admin-only; returns presets dict with keys news/about/contact/landing/blog each as non-empty list of {type, content}

POST /api/pages/seed-reserved -> idempotent. First call creates blog+news when absent; second call returns created=[] skipped=['blog','news']. Seeded pages have show_in_nav=True, auth_levels includes 'public', blocks populated from PAGE_PRESETS, is_published=False for freshly-created pages.
GET /api/sidebar-configs/public/{slug} (anon) -> 200 with only enabled widgets sorted by order; 404 for missing slug
GET /api/navigation/public -> default items contain Blog+News only; Videos/About absent
POST /api/navigation/seed-defaults -> only Blog+News seeded (Videos/About removed from DEFAULT_NAV_ITEMS)
Regression: navigation POST/PATCH/DELETE, GET /api/pages/custom/{slug} 404, GET /api/content/news list
critical_code_review_comments: news_feeds.py _parse_feed uses feedparser with 30s blocking IO inside a threadpool executor (size 5). Fine for /news/mixed-feed when feed count is small (<=10) but N serial executions per request — consider asyncio.gather(_parse_feed(url) for url in feeds) to parallelize.

news_feeds.py GET /feeds is public (no auth). OK since it's consumed by the public /news page, but response includes fetch_error strings which may leak internal URLs/paths. Consider scrubbing fetch_error for non-admin callers or splitting into /feeds (public, minimal) and /feeds/admin (full).

pages.py PAGE_PRESETS contact preset has NO 'hero' block and is not in {'blog','news'} seed-reserved list — presets for 'contact'/'landing'/'about' are defined but /seed-reserved only seeds blog+news. Verify this is intentional (review_request confirms blog+news only).

pages.py /seed-reserved uses require_admin (allows super_admin/org_admin/media_manager) while /navigation/seed-defaults uses require_super_admin — inconsistent privilege across seeders. Align both to super_admin unless intentional.

sidebar_configs.py POST auto-generates slug from name via regex but does not strip leading/trailing hyphens or handle collision-with-empty ('!!!' -> ''). Edge case: an all-symbol name yields empty slug which would collide for multiple configs.
sidebar_configs.py public endpoint returns full config document (including created_by, created_at) — consider trimming internal fields in public response.
navigation.py DEFAULT_NAV_ITEMS docstring in seed_default_nav_items still mentions 'Blog, Videos, News, About' (line 252) — update to 'Blog, News' to match new behavior.
seed_data_creation: Test creates throwaway unreachable feeds (auto-cleaned), one reachable feed (feedburner/TheHackersNews), one temp sidebar config (auto-cleaned), and may seed blog/news reserved pages (left in place — idempotent).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reusable regression file: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_27_news_consolidation.py. Env BASE_URL auto-loads from /app/frontend/.env if REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL not set. Uses super_admin login. Tests that depend on external RSS (feedburner) call pytest.skip() if the feed is unreachable from sandbox — safe fallback. /api/news/feeds GET is public (no auth); /api/news/feeds POST/PATCH/DELETE/refresh are super_admin only. /api/pages/seed-reserved requires admin (not super_admin only). /api/sidebar-configs POST auto-generates page_slug from name; capture returned page_slug before calling /public/{slug}.
rca of the issue: No production bugs found. Three initial test failures were test-setup issues: (1) REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL missing from env — fixed by reading /app/frontend/.env fallback. (2) Feedburner URL already existed from a prior run — added pre-test cleanup. (3) sidebar-configs payload assumed `page_slug` field but backend auto-derives from `name` — fixed to capture returned page_slug. (4) seed-reserved assumed fresh state — relaxed is_published=False assertion to apply only to pages created in this run.
